zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond於1344年4月20日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克沙尼德 卡素時，他的父親Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond51歲，母親Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice26歲。他於1359年7月20日與Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年7月30日在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里享年53歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭迪 本 克里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond于1344年4月20日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克沙尼德 卡素时，他的父亲Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond51岁，母亲Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice26岁。他于1359年7月20日与Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年7月30日在爱尔兰庫迪 克里享年53岁，埋葬在爱尔兰迪 本 克里。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond was born on 20 April 1344, in Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Ireland, his father, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, was 51 and his mother, Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice, was 26. He married Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond on 20 July 1359. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 30 July 1397, in County Kerry, Ireland, at the age of 53, and was buried in Diocese of Kerry, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond est né le 20 avril 1344, à Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlande, son père, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond le 20 juillet 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1397, à County Kerry, Irlande, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Diocese of Kerry, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond am 20. April 1344 in Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond 51 und seine Mutter Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice 26. Er hat am 20. Juli 1359 Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juli 1397 im Alter von 53 Jahren in County Kerry, Irland und wurde in Diocese of Kerry, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond è nato il il 20 aprile 1344 nel Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlanda, il suo padre, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond il 20 luglio 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 30 luglio 1397, nel County Kerry, Irlanda, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmondが1344年4月20日にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックシャニド カストルで生まれた時，父Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmondは51歳，母Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMauriceは26歳であった。1359年7月20日にEleanor Boteler Countess of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年7月30日にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーで53歳で死去し，アイルランドディオセゼ オフ ケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond(이)가 1344년 4월 20일 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 섀니드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1359년 7월 20일 Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 7월 30일 아일랜드 카운티 케리에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 디오스스 프 케리에 묻혔다.

mn.20 April 1344–30 July 1397: 1344 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 20–1397 оны Долоодугаар сарын 30

pt.20 April 1344–30 July 1397: 20 de abril de 1344–30 de julho de 1397
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond nasceu em 20 de abril de 1344, em Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlanda, seu pai, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond em 20 de julho de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de julho de 1397, em County Kerry, Irlanda, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond родился 20 апреля 1344 г. в местности шанид кастл, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond 20 июля 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 30 июля 1397 г. в местности коунти кирри, Ирландия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности диосес оф кирри, Ирландия.

es.20 April 1344–30 July 1397: 20 de abril de 1344–30 de julio de 1397
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond nació el 20 de abril de 1344, en Shanid Castle, County Limerick, Irlanda, su papá, Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Aveline FitzNicholas FitzMaurice, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond el 20 de julio de 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de julio de 1397, en County Kerry, Irlanda, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda.
